prompt: Build an HTTPS endpoint that accepts a customer JSON payload and pushes it to Salesforce over SOAP.
Poll an SFTP server for nightly order CSV files and post each record to S/4HANA via OData.
Receive a webhook, validate it against an XSD, branch on valid/invalid, and forward valid messages to SuccessFactors via OData.
Accept inbound orders, write to a JMS queue, return 202, then asynchronously process from the queue and call a backend.
Build a synchronous request-reply flow that calls an S/4HANA OData service with a $filter built from query params.
Sign every outbound payload with HMAC-SHA256 in a header before calling the partner API.
Add an exception subprocess that retries on 5xx with exponential backoff and dead-letters on permanent failure.
Split a 10,000-record XML into per-record sub-messages, post each to an API, then aggregate the results into a summary.
Translate partner country codes to SAP country codes inside a Message Mapping using a value mapping table.
Use XSLT mapping to group orders by customer and emit one batch per customer.
Notify integration owners by email when an exception subprocess fires.
Configure XSD validation that returns structured error details with xpath and line for each violation.
Fix a payload that fails with cvc-complex-type.2.4.a invalid content order.
Build a dead-letter queue per flow and write failed messages with original body and MPL id headers.
Set the HTTP response code to 202 Accepted in a synchronous endpoint that just queues the message.
Branch a flow based on whether validation produced any XSD errors and route invalid messages to a 400 response.
Pull an idempotent SFTP polling flow that moves processed files into an archive directory.
Implement an SAP backend call with Client Certificate authentication via Cloud Connector.
Cache a CSRF token across calls in an OData write flow.
Write a Groovy script that timestamps the payload and writes the result back to the message body.
